subject: Mathematics
question_text: A regular octagon is formed by joining the midpoints of the sides of a square of side length 8 cm. Find the area of the octagon.

solution_steps.description: The octagon area = square area - 4 corner triangles = 64 - 4×8 = 32 cm²

why_wrong_explanations.A: This option is incorrect. 32√2 cm² is not the right answer based on the given conditions.
why_wrong_explanations.B: This option is incorrect. 64 cm² is not the right answer based on the given conditions.
why_wrong_explanations.C: This option is incorrect. 32 cm² is not the right answer based on the given conditions.

learning_objectives: Understand Properties of regular polygons with equal sides and angles
